TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Takidis, title = Takidis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Takidis} }

S.FORM: == Takidis == u sulit nu Hulam: Śĺ∑ŚÖ∂ťáĆťÉ®ŤźĹ i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Takidis. u kasalumaluma' nu Takidis sa, 157 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 371 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 212 ku tademaw, pakalatu 57%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 159 ku tademaw, pakalatu 43%. u kasabinacadan, šļļŚŹ£śēłśúČŚáļŚÖ•. i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Lupakatj. u kasalumaluma' nu Lupakatj sa, 220 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 484 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 250 ku tademaw, pakalatu 52%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 234 ku tademaw, pakalatu 48%. u asip nu tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 48%, Pangcah(Amis) 1%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Puyuma 1%, zumazuma 1%. u Pangcah (Amis) a niyazu' u Pangcah (Amis) a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Pangcah (Amis) a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw i Taitung a kuwan, caay katuud ku Sakizaya. inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng. izaw tu hakya, caayhenay pasumad tu ngangan nu cidekay. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad
S.PHON: == takidis == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***** i taituŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu takidis. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu takidis sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, ******. i taituŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺupakatj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺupakatj sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, pujuma *%, zumazuma *%. u paŇč ¶ańß (amis) a nijazu Ē~ ° u paŇč ¶ańß (amis) a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku paŇč ¶ańß (amis) a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw i taituŇč a kuwan, ¶aaj katuud ku sakizaja. inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. izaw tu ńßakja, ¶aajńß…ônaj pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu ¶id…ôkaj. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (*,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***) tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad
S.FORM: == Takidis == u sulit nu Hulam: Śĺ∑ŚÖ∂ťáĆťÉ®ŤźĹ i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Takidis. u kasalumaluma' nu Takidis sa, 157 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 371 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 212 ku tademaw, pakalatu 57%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 159 ku tademaw, pakalatu 43%. u kasabinacadan, šļļŚŹ£śēłśúČŚáļŚÖ•. i Taitung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Lupakatj. u kasalumaluma' nu Lupakatj sa, 220 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 484 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 250 ku tademaw, pakalatu 52%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 234 ku tademaw, pakalatu 48%. u asip nu tademaw u kasabinacadan, Paywan(Paiwan) 48%, Pangcah(Amis) 1%, Yuwatan(Bunun) 1%, Puyuma 1%, zumazuma 1%. u Pangcah (Amis) a niyazu' u Pangcah (Amis) a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Pangcah (Amis) a tademaw itini mueneng. u Sakizaya a tademaw i Taitung a kuwan, caay katuud ku Sakizaya. inayi' ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini mueneng. izaw tu hakya, caayhenay pasumad tu ngangan nu cidekay. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 4 a bulad pulung sausi (561,327), Pangcah (209,430), Tayan (90,059), Paywan (100,689), Yuwatan (58,390), Rukay (13,314), Puyuma (14,140), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,607), Yami (4,606), Saw (785), Kabalan (1,465), Taluku (31,501), Sakizaya (929), Sejek (9,992), Laaluwa (399), Kanakanabu (334), zuma (12,052) tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 10 a bulad

sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, ******. i taituŇč a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺupakatj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺupakatj sa, *** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu tad…ômaw u kasabina ¶adan, pajwan(paiwan) **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, juwatan(bunun) *%, pujuma *%, sakizaja. inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč. izaw tu ńßakja, ¶aajńß…ônaj pasumad tu ŇčaŇčan nu ¶id…ôkaj. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw
